title: BackgroundInstallControlService getBackgroundInstalledPackages zero permission — full app list leak + cross-user
notes: DEVICE CONFIRMED. (1) getBackgroundInstalledPackages(0L, 0) returns ParceledListSlice with 22 packages (full package names + install times) WITHOUT any permission. Leaked apps include TikTok, ProtonVPN, Pokemon Go, Fitbit, Google Wallet, etc. (2) Cross-user query for user 10 SUCCEEDED without INTERACT_ACROSS_USERS — returned 0 packages but no SecurityException. (3) registerBackgroundInstallCallback needs proper IBinder callback (Java Proxy fails with NPE on asBinder). Feature flag bicClient() appears OFF on this device, bypassing the GET_BACKGROUND_INSTALLED_PACKAGES check entirely.
